div.p: Dataset: 768-Dimensions, f32 vectors Hardware: x86_64 AVX2 Enabled

ol.li: Crossover Point: Below 10K vectors, the fixed overhead of graph traversal (pointer chasing, cache misses) makes HNSW similar to the high-bandwidth SIMD linear scan of Brute-Force.
The Scalability Cliff: Brute-Force search time exceeds the 100ms "interactive" threshold at 200K vectors.
HNSW Efficiency: At 1M vectors, HNSW explores < 0.1% of the total dataset, resulting in the 50x latency advantage shown.
